brief_summary: Form-factor spectrum from low-profile flat (left) to sculpted-well palm-rested (right). Two sage-green anchor product cards plotted on the spectrum: ZSA Voyager on the left, MoErgo Glove80 on the right. Center area surfaces the 2026-W19 tracker score (+32, up) and the framing: 'the cohort has the two reference points it needs'.
data_sources: split-ergo-cohort.mdx § 'The Voyager line did the work' — 'ZSA's Voyager. A low-profile split with choc-spaced switches, hot-swap sockets ... ZSA's flagship since 2022'

split-ergo-cohort.mdx § 'Glove80 in dev newsletters' — 'MoErgo's Glove80. Column-staggered, sculpted palm rest, concave key wells ... between Voyager at the low-profile flat end and Glove80 at the sculpted-well end, the category has the two reference points it needs'
split-ergo-cohort.mdx § 'What we're watching' — '2026-W19 has the split/ergo row at score +32 and direction up'
